query: Resume the issue-autopilot run on #3259 — the prior session was interrupted mid-Stage-6.
expected_behavior: Reads /tmp/issue-autopilot-3259.state.json; prints a summary table of completed stages vs pending stages.
Asks the user to confirm resumption from the last completed stage + 1.
Validates the world hasn't moved (branch exists, PR still open, issue still open) before continuing.
Resumes execution from the relevant stage; never re-runs already-completed stages.
